sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_asin (value Float32, result Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO test_asin (value, result) VALUES (0.5, asin(0.5));
UPDATE test_asin SET result = asin(value) WHERE value BETWEEN 0.0 AND 1.0;
SELECT value, result FROM test_asin WHERE value < 1.0;
SELECT value, asin(value) AS arc_sine FROM test_asin WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
